message:
feat(output): add configurable width to IssueTable component

Add terminal width awareness to IssueTable for better rendering on
different terminal sizes. The title column now dynamically adjusts
its maximum width based on available space.

Changes:
- Add `width: Option<usize>` field to IssueTable struct
- Add `width()` builder method to set terminal width
- Calculate dynamic title_max_width based on terminal width:
  - Reserves ~100 chars for other columns (ID, status, priority, etc.)
  - Falls back to minimum of 60 chars
  - Default behavior unchanged when width is None
- Update title column and truncation to use dynamic width

This improves readability on wide terminals where titles were
unnecessarily truncated at 60 characters, and on narrow terminals
where the fixed width could cause layout issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
